name: Creamy Purple Onion and Basil Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the cream cheese to a smooth consistency, gradually adding the basil.
2. Blend in the sour cream and add the remaining ingredients.
3. Mix well until all components are fully combined.
4. Cover the mixture and chill in the refrigerator.
5. Makes about 2 1/2 cups of dip.
Suggested Dippers: Unsalted Potato Chips, Water Crackers, Green Bell Peppers, Mushrooms, Brussels Sprouts, Fennel, Smoked Deli Meats
